title: /k
summary_text: - Missing requirement: the request is only `/k`, so there is no task-level objective, acceptance criteria, or non-goals yet; without that, Kernel orchestration cannot move from bootstrap posture into concrete execution. - Safe immediate next step: treat this as a **requirement-framing** state and return one focused instruction line (goal + success condition) before any implementation, then run/bootstrap with that focus so evidence can be tied to a concrete lane plan. - Fail-closed concern: the current `doctor` state is already `codex-provider-evidence-missing`/`BLOCKED` (receipt has 6 codex slots, but no real `glm` + specialist evidence), so this must stay blocked until real `codex`, `glm`, and at least one specialist provider success are recorded and manifest evidence is live.
